reviews.title: Great fit
reviews.body: These earbuds are amazing. They stayed securely in place the entire time during my run. Highly recommend!
reviews.highlight_phrase: stayed securely in place the entire time

reviews.title: Good but slips
reviews.body: The sound quality is good, but when you sweat in these they constantly rotate. Not great for heavy gym sessions.
reviews.highlight_phrase: sweat in these they constantly rotate
